channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Rubbish around here and needs clearing away please, 24th April
item.description:
.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Porcupine Close, Eltham

item.title: Litter and greenery along road, 24th April
item.description:
Please could this be cleaned off the pavement and road please? Thank you!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 228, Bromley Road, Shortlands, Greater London

item.title: Dumped car, 24th April

Dumped grey vauxhall front & back number plates removed car needs removing
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kangley Bridge Road, Perry Vale, Greater London

item.title: Blocked drain, 24th April
item.description:
Please could this be cleaned asap please? Thank you!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 228, Bromley Road, Shortlands, Greater London

item.title: Dumped car, 24th April
item.description:
Dumped car sorned on a public road no road tax needs removing

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kent House Lane, New Beckenham, Greater London

item.title: 2 large gas cannisters under abbotshall road sign, junction with ardoch road, 24th April
item.description:
Many children pass here to get to playing fields - please remove quickly for their safety
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Abbotshall Road, Catford South, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unearthed bollard, 24th April
item.description:
Unearthed bollard, hazard uneven footpath

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Antelope Road, Woolwich

item.title: Weeds and rubbish, 24th April
item.description:
Overgrown weeds in alley, rubbish caught in weeds in alley

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Boneta Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin bags and building materials fly tipped, 24th April
item.description:
Rubbish and building materials have been left over plants crushing them, I didn't see who did it but they have done it more than once as the amount has increased over the past week.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fountain Drive, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The B16 Yorklands Bus Stop in Hook Lane is being used to dump Household waste at least twice a week every week., 24th April
item.description:
This is becoming a regular dumping site for someone. Clearly volumes of mixed Household Waste in plastic bags and often shopping trolleys. Can cameras be fitted to the site to catch the offenders please. Its absolutely disgusting.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hook Lane, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parking permit sign, 24th April
item.description:
Permit sign painted over

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ulverstone Road, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vehicle left for weeks in car park, 24th April
item.description:
There is a SORN BMW that has been parked in the parking space near BH 29-37 Shortlands Close opposit the bin store for over 6 weeks. Please can this be removed.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shortlands Close, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Next to 113 Godstow Road: bags of rubbish., 24th April
item.description:
Rubbish is on grass verge that leads to new houses built where garages used to be.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Godstow Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead Tree, 24th April
item.description:
This is a dead tree in Pembroke Park which n Ed’s cutting down.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beechfield Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped rubvish, 24th April
item.description:
Loads of stuff left here even once the bin men have come. You'd think they would have reported it .

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bush Road, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Three plastic tubs containing chicken located in front of 7 Palatine Road waste has been left at the foot of a tree between house numbers 7 and 9., 24th April
item.description:
Three plastic tubs containing chicken located in front of 7 Palatine Road waste has been left at the foot of a tree between house numbers 7 and 9.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Palatine Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree is very tall and getting a very thick trunk., 24th April
item.description:
Much larger than other trees in the road and looks like it may damage pavement in future if not trimmed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Woodmere Way, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 brown bins full of rubbish, 24th April
item.description:
People are dumping weekly And yes. This is a council alleyway.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 28, Cleve Road, Albany Park, Sidcup, Greater London
